title: Add collapsible comment history with toggle link and reposition submit/cancel buttons

requirements.summary: Add a 'History' link with an icon positioned opposite the existing 'Comments' label in the ActivitySection component
acceptanceCriteria: History link appears on the same row as the 'Comments' label
Link includes a recognizable history icon
Link is clickable and toggles comment history visibility

file_operations.description: Add a 'History' link with a history icon (e.g., clock or history icon from lucide-react) positioned opposite the 'Comments' label in the header row. Implement onClick handler to toggle the history visibility state. Ensure the link and label are aligned using flexbox with space-between to position them on opposite ends of the same row.

requirements.summary: Make the comment history section in ActivitySection visible only when the history link is clicked, implementing a toggle state
acceptanceCriteria: Comment history is initially hidden by default
Clicking the history link shows the comment history
Clicking again hides the comment history
Visual indicator shows whether history is expanded or collapsed

file_operations.description: Add a boolean state (e.g., showHistory) to control the visibility of the comment history section. Set the initial state to false (hidden). Conditionally render the ActivityTimeline component based on this state. Update the history link to toggle this state on click and display a visual indicator (e.g., chevron icon that rotates or changes) to show whether the section is expanded or collapsed.

requirements.summary: Move the submit and cancel button section in the phone screen to appear below the document section in the case detail layout
acceptanceCriteria: Submit and cancel buttons render after the DocumentsSection component
Layout maintains proper spacing and alignment within the PhoneMockup
Buttons remain accessible and functional in their new position

file_operations.description: Reorder the components within the PhoneMockup so that the submit and cancel button section renders after the DocumentsSection component. Ensure proper spacing is maintained between the sections using appropriate margin or padding classes. Verify that the buttons remain fully functional and accessible in their new position within the scrollable phone screen layout.
